scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @agp/shared && npm run build --workspace @agp/docs && npm run build --workspace @agp/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @agp/docs && npm run lint --workspace @agp/web
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @agp/docs && npm run typecheck --workspace @agp/web
